name: docxmcp-http-transport

systems.name: opencode runtime
systems.description: User-level daemon that registers and connects to MCP apps.

containers.name: opencode bun daemon
containers.description: Hosts mcp client (HTTP + stdio per-app), dispatcher, file-routes.

containers.name: docxmcp HTTP server
containers.description: Long-running HTTP server. NO bind mount; NO host filesystem visibility. Optional docker named volume for bundle cache.
containers.boundaryRule: Mounts list MUST be empty except for `docxmcp-cache` named volume.

containers.name: user project worktree
containers.description: Stores incoming/<filename> + bundles published next to source. Daemon writes here; docxmcp container CANNOT see it.

containers.name: docxmcp shell wrappers
containers.description: Non-Docker surface. CLI users invoke `<toolname> <path>`; wrapper internally does docker cp + exec + cleanup. NOT registered with opencode AI tool catalog (R6).

components.name: MCP client per-app transport switch
components.description: Dispatches StreamableHTTPClientTransport for docxmcp; StdioClientTransport for other mcp apps.

components.name: MCP App Store with bind-mount lint
components.description: addApp() rejects entries containing -v / --mount type=bind. Exposes audit-bind-mounts route.

components.name: incoming.dispatcher (HTTP uploader)
components.description: before(): multipart POST /files → token → rewrite args. after(): parse base64 tar bundle from result → write to <repo>/<sourceDir>/<stem>/ → best-effort DELETE /files/{token}. NO hard-link, NO break-on-write.

components.name: docxmcp MCP server (Streamable HTTP)
components.description: Exposes /mcp via mcp.server.streamable_http_manager. Routes tool calls to bin/*.py CLIs via _mcp_registry.

components.name: Token store
components.description: TTL + LRU + size-cap registry over /tmp/docxmcp-sessions/<token>/<filename>. Ephemeral; container restart wipes.

components.name: Tool wrapper registry
components.description: 21 ToolSpecs with input_schema {token: string}. build_argv resolves token → path → forwards to bin/<tool>.py.

components.name: sha-keyed bundle cache
components.description: Reads/writes /var/cache/docxmcp/bundles/<sha>/. Persists across container restarts via named volume.

relationships.purpose: MCP tools/list, tools/call over Streamable HTTP
upload incoming/<file> as multipart binary, receive token
rewritten args (token instead of path) routed via mcp client
read incoming/<file> for upload; write bundle output to <sourceDir>/<stem>/
docker cp + docker exec via host docker daemon (no bind mount)

deploymentNotes: C-DAEMON runs as user-level systemd unit. C-DOCXMCP runs via `docker compose up -d`, healthcheck on /healthz, restart unless-stopped. NO `-v <host-path>:<container-path>` flags. Optional `docxmcp-cache` named volume for sha-keyed bundle cache (host invisible). C-WRAPPERS installed by docxmcp `install.sh` to `~/.local/bin/docxmcp-tools/`.
